title: Glockenspiel - Tuned Metal-Bar Idiophone Build Packet
skill_version: v5 candidate refresh over v4.3 root-mode packet
release_status: V5 build-packet candidate; not build-ready, measured, or tuned

authority_summary.bar_dimensions: family-spec.csv and glockenspiel-design-table.xlsx are first-pass design-table authority only; pilot measurements must recalibrate K before full cutting.
authority_summary.node_support: node positions in family-spec.csv and drawings are formula-derived at 22.4%/77.6%; support/grommet behavior requires pilot sustain data.
authority_summary.metallurgy: 6061-T6 material constants are literature/workbook values; mill-lot certificate or measured K_eff is required before release.
authority_summary.tuning: validation.csv and validation-loop.csv define the measurement loop; no measured tuning data is committed.

honest_uncertainties: No bar has been cut, drilled, mounted, struck, or measured in this repo.
Workbook K=204431 is a literature-derived first pass; per-mill-lot K may differ by 5-10%.
Grommet durometer (Shore 30A/50A/70A) is TBD until the support pilot is run.
Frame ergonomics and accidental row offset are TBD until a full-size taped layout is validated.
Supplier price, stock, MOQ, and lead-time rows are not current purchase evidence.
Native SolidWorks files are not committed; the cad folder defines the global-variable and design-table contract.
Generated SVG/PDF/site assets are review outputs and do not replace design-table, CAD, or measured authority.
validation_notes: Run `python3 ${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/skills/instrument-maker/scripts/validate_visual_authority.py visual-output-register.csv` after visual register changes.
Run `python3 ${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/skills/instrument-maker/scripts/validate_acoustic_law.py family-spec.csv`; idiophone rows are expected to skip acoustic-law enforcement.
